catalogData.name: Air
properties: Physical Resistance, Electricity Immunity, Fire Vulnerability
Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Infuse Mana
powers.raw: Infuse Mana (Trait): +Force/2 on Detection spell Drain tests

powers.name: Sustain Spell
powers.raw: Sustain Spell (No Action, Sustained): Sustain one Detection spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
powers.text: Sustain one Detection spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

evolvedPowers.name: Banishing Resistance
evolvedPowers.raw: Banishing Resistance (Trait): Double Force vs. Negate

evolvedPowers.name: Disappear
evolvedPowers.raw: Disappear (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Invisibility on self at Force. Extends to Astral Plane.
evolvedPowers.text: Cast Invisibility on self at Force. Extends to Astral Plane.

evolvedPowers.name: Primary Spell
evolvedPowers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Oxygenate at Force

elementalFormulaePower.name: Elemental Formulae
elementalFormulaePower.raw: Elemental Formulae (Complex Action, Sustained): 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
elementalFormulaePower.text: 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

greatFormPowers.name: Control Winds
greatFormPowers.raw: Control Winds (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Levitate at Force

greatFormPowers.name: Electrocute
greatFormPowers.raw: Electrocute (Complex Action): Cast Lightning Storm at Force centered on self. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Lightning Storm at Force centered on self. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.
